channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Judge halts local TV giant Nexstar's takeover of rival Tegna until trial
item.description: U.S. Judge Trevor Nunley ruled that consumers could suffer irreparable harm if Nexstar integrated Tegna's stations into its own operations ahead of an antitrust trial.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. Judge Trevor Nunley ruled that consumers could suffer irreparable harm if Nexstar integrated Tegna's stations into its own operations ahead of an antitrust trial.

(Image credit: Joe Sohm/Visions of America)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Deaths of migrants in ICE custody hit record high under Trump
item.description: Twenty-nine people have died in ICE custody since October, the start of the federal government's fiscal year, already surpassing 2004's toll of 28, the previous record, according to government data.
item.content:encoded:
Twenty-nine people have died in ICE custody since October, the start of the federal government's fiscal year, already surpassing 2004's toll of 28, the previous record, according to government data.

(Image credit: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Animal activists celebrate their first global 'Sanctuary Day'
item.description: It's been 40 years since animal advocates founded a sanctuary for farm animals in New York and California, and they say April 17 is their first global sanctuary day.
item.content:encoded: It's been 40 years since animal advocates founded a sanctuary for farm animals in New York and California, and they say April 17 is their first global sanctuary day.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Bottar

item.title: Gasoline could drop below $4 in coming days
item.description: Gasoline costs should start to fall soon, although a full recovery to pre-war prices is expected to take months. That's assuming that peace holds and traffic flows resume through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded:
Gasoline costs should start to fall soon, although a full recovery to pre-war prices is expected to take months. That's assuming that peace holds and traffic flows resume through the Strait of Hormuz.

(Image credit: Patrick T. Fallon)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Why scientists are nervous about fungi
item.description: They can pose a threat to human health — yeast infections are but one example. Scientists say not enough attention is paid to their ability to develop resistance to medications that treat them.
item.content:encoded:
They can pose a threat to human health — yeast infections are but one example. Scientists say not enough attention is paid to their ability to develop resistance to medications that treat them.

(Image credit: Shawn Lockhart)
item.dc:creator: Gabrielle Emanuel

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz opens for commercial ships but the U.S. blockade continues on Iran
item.description: Iran's foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz is open, following the start of an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. President Trump swiftly responded that the U.S. naval blockade on Iran will continue.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz is open, following the start of an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. President Trump swiftly responded that the U.S. naval blockade on Iran will continue.

(Image credit: Ibrahim Amro)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Israel starts a tense ceasefire in Lebanon. And, Trump nominates a new CDC director.
item.description: A 10-day ceasefire to pause fighting between Israel and Hezb
item.content:encoded:
A 10-day ceasefire to pause fighting between Israel and Hezb

(Image credit: Adri Salido)
item.dc:creator: Suzanne Nuyen

item.title: Who says they have no fear of the Trump administration? The quiz knows
item.description: Also: If you know what Eric Swalwell looks like, you'll get at least one question correct.
item.content:encoded: Also: If you know what Eric Swalwell looks like, you'll get at least one question correct.
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Human rights groups raise alarm over fate of Salvadorans deported from U.S.
item.description: Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.
item.content:encoded:
Migrants deported from the U.S. routinely disappear into El Salvador's prisons the moment they land or in the weeks that follow. Many remain incommunicado from family and lawyers for years.

(Image credit: Illustration by Jackie Lay/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Do less, ask for more: How to make life easier as a working parent
item.description: Going back to work after having a baby can be overwhelming. You're juggling all the emotions of being a new parent while getting up to speed at your job. Tips to help you make a smooth transition.
item.content:encoded: Going back to work after having a baby can be overwhelming. You're juggling all the emotions of being a new parent while getting up to speed at your job. Tips to help you make a smooth transition.
item.dc:creator: Andee Tagle
